item.title: I built a campervan
item.description: .container { margin: auto; max-width: 1200px; justify-content: space-between; } .responsive-image { max-width: 100%; } .cell img { display: block; } @media screen and (min-width: 600px) { .grid { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; flex-direction: row; } .cell { width: 50%; } } @media screen and (min-width: 1000px) { .cell { width: calc(100% / 3); } } In June 2017 I got a 2010 Opel Movano with the idea of turning it into a mobile home and moving into and driving it all across Europe(and possibly beyond).

item.title: First steps with Machine Learning
item.description: I have decided to learn machine learning. I will post here once I achieve anything, i.e. create some models, have some graphs to show. Stay tuned.
